zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana Cardinan於大約1200年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton29歲，母親Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam26歲。她於1218年與Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1234年在她的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana Cardinan于大约1200年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton29岁，母亲Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam26岁。她于1218年与Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1234年在她的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cardinan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Adelard, Alberic, Clovis, Colette, Fabienne, Fernand, Francois, Germaine, Gilles.

French and English: from Old French, Middle English cardinal ‘cardinal’, the church dignitary (Latin cardinalis, originally an adjective meaning ‘crucial’). The surname was probably bestowed as a nickname on someone who habitually dressed in red, or who had played the part of a cardinal in a pageant, or who acted in a lordly and patronizing manner.
English: possibly also an altered form of Carbonell . Reaney notes that Cardinal's Farm in Foxearth (Essex) is recorded as Carbonels in 1381 and Cardynals in 1577.

variants.name: Carbonell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Eduardo, Rafael, Roberto, Carlos, Manuel, Miguel, Pablo, Rolando.
Catalan: from an old personal name, Carbonellus in Latin, derived from Latin carbo ‘coal, charcoal’. This surname is also found in southern France (mainly Pyrénées-Orientales).

English (of Norman or Huguenot origin): nickname for a man with dark hair or a swarthy complexion, from a diminutive of Anglo-Norman French carbon ‘charcoal’. The name was also reintroduced to Britain by Huguenot refugees in the 17th century.

variants.name: Cardinale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Salvatore, Mario, Rocco, Vito, Angelo, Antonio, Cosimo, Salvador, Carlo, Cosmo, Francesca, Gasper, Gennaro, Angelina, Demetrio, Gaspar, Gerardo, Julio, Lucrecia, Romero, Rosario.
Italian: from cardinale ‘cardinal’ (see Cardinal ), a nickname for a haughty individual, or a metonymic occupational name for the servant of a cardinal.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana Cardinan was born about 1200, in Cornwall, England, her father, Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton, was 29 and her mother, Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam, was 26. She married Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal in 1218, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1234, in her hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana Cardinan est née environ 1200, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal en 1218, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1234, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana Cardinan um 1200 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton 29 und ihre Mutter Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam 26. Sie hat 1218 in England Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1234 im Alter von 35 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana Cardinan è nata il circa 1200 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal nel 1218, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1234, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana Cardinanが約1200年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngtonは29歳，母Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliamは26歳であった。1218年にイギリスでHenry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1234年に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana Cardinan(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1218년 영국에서 Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1234년 그녀의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal em 1218, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1234, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana Cardinan родилась около 1200 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert De Cardinham Of Blyngton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Hastings FitzWilliam, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Bodrugan Sheriff of Cornwal в 1218 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1234 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.
